recipe.title: Lemon Butter Orecchiette with Burrata and Roasted Pistachios

ingredients.name: orecchiette pasta
ingredients.note: Creator-requested pasta shape replacing spaghetti; shell cups must stay visible.

ingredients.name: salted or unsalted butter
ingredients.note: Diced; 4 Tbsp browned for sauce, 2 Tbsp finished into pasta.

ingredients.name: lemons
ingredients.quantity: 2 lemons zest plus juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.note: Use zest as the dominant visible citrus cue.

ingredients.name: salt and black pepper
ingredients.note: Black pepper added as visible final speckle.

ingredients.name: breadcrumbs
ingredients.note: Toasted golden with capers, thyme, parmesan, and chili.

ingredients.name: capers
ingredients.note: Fried until wrinkled and glossy; salty pop.

ingredients.name: crushed red pepper flakes
ingredients.note: Tiny red heat flecks for contrast.

ingredients.name: grated parmesan cheese
ingredients.note: Melts into crisp topping and final snow.

ingredients.name: dry thyme or herbes de Provence
ingredients.note: Herb flecks in the crisp crumb.

ingredients.name: fresh basil
ingredients.note: Torn green finish; quantify on plating to avoid garnish drift.

ingredients.name: burrata cheese
ingredients.note: Use two small balls or one large ball; torn open for creamy center.

ingredients.name: shelled pistachios
ingredients.note: Creator-requested supplemental topping; roast and roughly chop for crunch.

steps.text: Roast shelled pistachios in a dry skillet until fragrant, blistered, and lightly golden; cool briefly and roughly chop.
steps.visualCue: green pistachios darken at the edges, tiny oil sheen, rough chopped shards
steps.textureCue: dry crackle, crunchy shards, roasted nut dust
steps.runwayRisk: Pistachios can drift into generic green crumbs; lock as rough 3-6 mm nut shards, not powder.

steps.text: Bring salted water to a boil and cook orecchiette until al dente; reserve 1/2 cup pasta water and drain.
steps.visualCue: orecchiette shells tumble through boiling water and catch steam in their cups
steps.textureCue: matte-to-glossy pasta shells, starchy water, steam
steps.runwayRisk: Pasta shape may become spaghetti; restate orecchiette cup shape in every pasta segment.

steps.text: Toast breadcrumbs with olive oil, butter, capers, thyme, parmesan, and chili flakes until golden and capers are fried.
steps.visualCue: golden crumbs, wrinkled capers, red pepper flecks, parmesan speckles
steps.textureCue: sandy crisp crumb, popping caper skins, oily shimmer
steps.runwayRisk: Topping can look like wet paste; keep it dry, separate, and sandy.

steps.text: Brown butter in the skillet, swirl until foamy and nutty amber; add garlic for one minute, then lemon juice and zest.
steps.visualCue: butter foam collapses into amber speckles, garlic sizzles, lemon zest rains in
steps.textureCue: glossy fat, amber milk solids, sharp lemon steam
steps.runwayRisk: Butter can look burnt or greasy; lock honey-amber brown butter with suspended speckles.

steps.text: Add pasta water, orecchiette, and remaining butter; toss until every cup is glossy and lightly emulsified.
steps.visualCue: orecchiette cups flip through a satin lemon-butter glaze
steps.textureCue: silky sauce clinging inside shell cups, steam, elastic toss
steps.runwayRisk: Emulsion can become soup; show a thin glossy coating, not a puddle.

steps.text: Plate hot orecchiette, tear burrata open on top, shower with crispy capers, basil, parmesan, lemon zest, black pepper, and roasted pistachios.
steps.visualCue: burrata cream spills over lemony orecchiette, pistachio shards catch in the sauce
steps.textureCue: warm pasta gloss, cold creamy burrata center, crunchy crumb and pistachio contrast
steps.runwayRisk: Garnish quantity can drift; lock pistachios as a visible one-to-two tablespoon sprinkle per plate.

assumptions: Use orecchiette as the pasta throughout, replacing the source recipe's spaghetti option.
Add 1/3 cup shelled pistachios as a supplemental roasted topping; roast before other skillet work so the crunch appears as an early hook and final payoff.
Use 1 large or 2 small burrata balls for 4 servings; the video should show a generous creamy tear rather than a small dollop.

No recipe-specific intermediate image references are required at ingest because orecchiette, burrata, crumbs, pistachios, lemon zest, and skillet actions are describable with existing kitchen/utensil references and strong prompt locks.
criticalTransformations: Dry-roasting pistachios from matte green nuts to fragrant lightly blistered crunchy shards.
Toasting breadcrumbs and capers into a dry golden sandy topping without turning it into a paste.
Browning butter to honey amber with visible milk-solid speckles before adding garlic and lemon.
Emulsifying pasta water, butter, lemon, and starch into a thin glossy coating that clings inside orecchiette cups.
Tearing burrata so cold cream spills over hot pasta while keeping the cheese recognizable and voluptuous.
visualTextureOpportunities: Extreme macro of burrata tearing open and cream sliding over glossy orecchiette cups.
Pistachios cracking under the knife into rough green-gold shards and dust.
Brown butter foam collapsing into amber speckles around garlic.
Lemon zest falling like yellow sparks into hot butter steam.
Orecchiette cups flipping in the skillet, each shell lacquered with lemon butter.
Crispy caper breadcrumbs raining over white burrata cream and green pistachio shards.
Final fork lift with cream, sauce, crumb, basil, and pistachio all clinging together.
possibleHooks: Burrata rupture: a spoon tears the white ball and cream floods lemon-glossed orecchiette.
Pistachio crunch: roasted nuts are chopped into rough shards with an ASMR crackle before the pasta payoff.
Brown butter sizzle: lemon zest hits amber butter and releases a sharp steam burst.
Orecchiette cup toss: pasta shells flip in slow-looking but hard-cut ASMR rhythm, glossy and sexy.
Crunch shower: golden caper crumbs and pistachios fall over creamy burrata in a high-contrast money shot.
promptPolicySources: Recipe source structured data from Del's Cooking Twist URL.
Creator instruction: use orecchiette instead of spaghetti or generic pasta.
Creator instruction: add roasted pistachios as an extra crunchy topping and supplemental step.
Creator instruction: avoid generating intermediate reference images unless indispensable; rely on existing asset library.
Workspace Seedance References rules: seedance2, 1080:1920, kitchen continuity pair, explicit reference roles, no first/last keyframe workflow.
ASMR food direction: texture-first opening, 75-80 percent detail shots, hard cuts, no speech, no voiceover, no music in video prompts.
